summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TMS Vehicles/Fleet Management Phase 4. Core vehicle CRUD, inspections, and maintenance functionality working well with 87.5% success rate. Found one critical routing bug in fleet tracking endpoint.

critical_bugs.issue: Route conflict - FastAPI matches /vehicles/{vehicle_id} before /vehicles/fleet-tracking, causing 404 'Vehicle not found'
critical_bugs.impact: Fleet tracking dashboard completely broken - cannot get real-time vehicle locations
critical_bugs.root_cause: Route definition order in vehicles_routes.py - specific routes must come before parameterized routes

minor_issues.issue: Driver creation endpoint returns 404 - no user management API available for test setup
minor_issues.impact: Cannot test driver assignment functionality fully

passed_tests: POST /api/fleet/vehicles - Create power unit (tractor) with VIN, license plate, year/make/model
POST /api/fleet/vehicles - Create trailer with automatic category detection (trailer vs power_unit)
GET /api/fleet/vehicles - List vehicles with comprehensive filtering (status, type, category, CVIP expiring)
GET /api/fleet/vehicles/summary - Fleet dashboard with status counts and compliance alerts
GET /api/fleet/vehicles/{id} - Get detailed vehicle info with driver/inspection/maintenance history
PUT /api/fleet/vehicles/{id} - Update vehicle details (odometer, status, notes)
POST /api/fleet/vehicles/{id}/inspections - Add CVIP inspection with Canadian compliance tracking
POST /api/fleet/vehicles/{id}/maintenance - Add maintenance record with cost tracking
GET /api/fleet/vehicles/{id}/maintenance - Get maintenance history with PM scheduling
POST /api/fleet/vehicles/{id}/location - Update GPS location with odometer tracking
CVIP status calculation (valid/expiring/expired based on expiry dates)
Vehicle category auto-detection (power_unit vs trailer based on vehicle_type)
Canadian VIN tracking and license plate management
Maintenance cost tracking with labor and parts breakdown
Date-based filtering for CVIP compliance monitoring
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Fix fleet tracking route conflict by moving @router.get('/vehicles/fleet-tracking') before @router.get('/vehicles/{vehicle_id}') in vehicles_routes.py. This completely breaks the real-time fleet tracking dashboard.
success_percentage: Backend: 87.5% (14/16 tests passed). Fleet tracking API completely broken due to route conflict bug.
